ddls:
CREATE TABLE "liquidity_pools" (
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each liquidity pool */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the liquidity pool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the liquidity pool */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pool was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pool was last updated */,
  "total_value_locked" REAL /* Total value locked in the pool */,
  "trading_volume" REAL /* Total trading volume of the pool */,
  "total_fees_collected" REAL /* Total fees collected by the pool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrency_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency pair */,
  "base_asset" TEXT /* Base asset of the pair (e.g., Bitcoin) */,
  "quote_asset" TEXT /* Quote asset of the pair (e.g., Ethereum) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pair was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pair was last updated */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the pair */,
  "volume_24h" REAL /* 24-hour volume of the pair */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading fee */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency pair associated with the fee */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., maker, taker) */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fee was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fee was last updated */,
  "fee_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_fees_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrency_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "liquidity_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each liquidity provider */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the liquidity pool the provider is participating in */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider was last updated */,
  "total_liquidity_provided" REAL /* Total liquidity provided by the provider */,
  "total_fees_earned" REAL /* Total fees earned by the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_liquidity_providers_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES liquidity_pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency pair traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the trade */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was executed */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee paid for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrency_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pool_tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the liquidity pool the token is held in */,
  "token_address" TEXT /* Address of the token */,
  "balance" REAL /* Balance of the token */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token was last updated */,
  "token_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the token in the pool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pool_tokens_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES liquidity_pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "token_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the token associated with the price */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the token */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price was recorded */,
  "price_change_24h" REAL /* Price change of the token in the last 24 hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_token_prices_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES pool_tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "liquidity_pool_returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the liquidity pool associated with the return */,
  "return_amount" REAL /* Amount of the return */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the return was recorded */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Percentage return of the pool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_liquidity_pool_returns_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES liquidity_pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impermanent_losses" (
  "loss_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loss */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the liquidity pool associated with the loss */,
  "loss_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loss */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loss was recorded */,
  "loss_percentage" REAL /* Percentage loss of the pool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loss_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impermanent_losses_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES liquidity_pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, trader) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the log */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user accessed the platform */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pool_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the liquidity pool associated with the audit */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit (e.g., security, performance) */,
  "audit_result" TEXT /* Result of the audit */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pool_audits_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES liquidity_pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pool_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the liquidity pool associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high_volatility, low_liquidity) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pool_alerts_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES liquidity_pools ("pool_id")
)
